use_cases: Primary action trigger for forms and dialogs
Icon or text buttons for toolbars and controls
ai_summary: A foundational button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, providing 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features standard accessibility attributes including focus-visible ring styling and disabled states. Designed as a reusable atomic component for any React application using Tailwind CSS for styling.
